name: Builderfan [SEWH]
description:
REALLY need that fusion coil

You’re really tired of getting killed all the time so you’ve been saving up for the fusion coil only to be one dosh off… and you’re really impatient so u end up using alternative payment for it.

Omg a non forsaken bot from your (yes, YOUR 🫵) glorious queen rizzler? Ik it’s crazy but I love this lil guy and I HAVE to get freaky w him so enjoy ❤️

Also I had to have my brother confirm Builderfan’s gender bc I genuinely couldn’t tell 🥀🥀

tag: Something Evil Will Happen
